title: Juformin Heavy Duty Steel Garage Utility Hooks, 8 Pack, Black, Wall Mount, 50 Lb Capacity, Minimalist Style
features: 【Well-built and Sturdy storage hook】Made of powder coated solid steel which provides supporting capacity of 50 LB maximally, and the soft anti-slip PVC coating to avoid scratches and fall off. Waterproof and rustproof, suitable for both indoors and outdoors use;

【Easy to Store Bulky Items】This garage utility hook is not just qualified for hanging ladders and garden hoses, but also versatile for other bulky or heavy items, such as bikes, tires, cables, electrical cords, leaf blower, chainsaw, shovel, step stools, lawn chairs, wagons, strollers, laundry baskets, drying racks, kayak, skateboard and etc;

【Multipurpose garage wall hooks】Mount it in your garage, shed, barn, backyard, attic, closet, basement, pantry, garden fence or laundry room as you wish. To get the messy items off the floor and still be able to lift and lower them easily. And to keep your home tidy, organized, free of clutters and hazards;

【Easy to Use】Each garage wall utility hooks comes with two pre-drilled holes and 2 set screws & anchors for easy installation. It fits most wall surfaces. To solve the storage with a minimum of wall space;
【Buy With Confidence】Simply design with various functions. We stand behind our garage wall utility hook and every single order is superior service guaranteed.
description: Juformin Heavy Duty Utility Hooks for Garage Storage Utility Hooks Wall Mount You must be looking for a reliable garage storage system hooks for your garden tools, bulky lawn furniture and equipment, such as ladders, garden hoses, bikes, tires, cables, electrical cords, leaf blower, chainsaw, shovel, step stools, lawn chairs, wagons, strollers, laundry baskets, drying racks, kayak, skateboard and etc; Then this hanger/hook is your best choice: To keep your floor tidy and organized; To reclaim valuable floor and shelf space; To solve the storage with a minimum of wall space; To hanger the ladder, garden hoses, bikes and other obstacles firmly on the wall; To lift and lower items easily; No fear of falling over or young kids pulling it down; Specifications: Material: High strength steel Quantity: 8 Pcs Color: Black Size: 3.4*4.7*0.87 inches Package include: Wall mount garage hooks x 8 Pcs Screws and Anchors x 16 set Note: Please allow slight size error due to manual measurement; Do not hang things over 50lbs Do not recommended for items over 20 lbs if drywall mounted
